vocabulary.exampleCn: 在马杜罗被罢免后不到六个月。

vocabulary.en: a military transport aircraft manufactured by Lockheed Martin
vocabulary.excerpt: The Colombians were also able to fly into Caracas with two Hercules C-130
vocabulary.exampleCn: 哥伦比亚人也能够用两架C-130大力神运输机飞入加拉加斯。

vocabulary.en: a branch of the U.S. Armed Forces responsible for amphibious operations
vocabulary.excerpt: A major general from the Marine Corps arrived in Caracas
vocabulary.exampleCn: 一位来自海军陆战队的少将抵达加拉加斯。

sentences.en: The earthquake death toll continues to rise.
sentences.cn: 地震死亡人数持续上升。
sentences.structure: 简单主谓结构：主语（The earthquake death toll）+ 谓语（continues to rise）。
sentences.analysis: 新闻常用表达，'death toll' 意为死亡人数，'continues to rise' 表示持续上升，体现事态发展。

sentences.en: The first 48 to 72 hours are widely regarded as the golden window to reach people who may still be buried alive.
sentences.cn: 最初的48到72小时被广泛视为接触可能仍被活埋人员的黄金窗口期。
sentences.structure: 主句（The first 48 to 72 hours are widely regarded as the golden window）+ 不定式短语（to reach people）+ 定语从句（who may still be buried alive）。
sentences.analysis: 'golden window' 是救援术语，指最佳救援时间；'buried alive' 意为被活埋；被动语态 'are widely regarded as' 体现普遍观点。

sentences.en: This is new video showing passengers panicking aboard a plane at the international airport North of Caracas as the powerful tremors shook the aircraft on the tarmac.
sentences.cn: 这是一段新视频，显示在加拉加斯以北的国际机场，当强烈震动摇晃停机坪上的飞机时，乘客在机上惊慌失措。
sentences.structure: 主句（This is new video）+ 现在分词短语（showing passengers panicking）+ 地点状语（at the international airport North of Caracas）+ 时间状语从句（as the powerful tremors shook the aircraft on the tarmac）。
sentences.analysis: 'showing' 引导伴随动作；'as' 引导时间状语从句，表示同时发生；'panicking' 描述乘客状态；'tarmac' 指停机坪。

sentences.en: I think that that is a smart point, a smart angle to explore today, is that today is the day we are finally seeing the aid coming in.
sentences.cn: 我认为这是一个聪明的观点，一个今天值得探讨的聪明角度，那就是今天我们终于看到援助到来。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+ 宾语从句（that that is a smart point, a smart angle to explore today）+ 表语从句（is that today is the day）+ 定语从句（we are finally seeing the aid coming in）。
sentences.analysis: 多个 'that' 的用法：第一个 'that' 引导宾语从句，第二个 'that' 作主语；'the day' 后省略关系副词 'when'；'seeing the aid coming in' 是感官动词结构。

sentences.en: The Colombians were also able to fly into Caracas with two Hercules C-130, which, of course, took time, because the runway itself at the international airport, which serves the city of Caracas, was badly damaged.
sentences.cn: Kolombia juga mampu terbang ke Caracas dengan dua pesawat angkut Hercules C-130, yang tentu saja memakan waktu, karena landasan pacu bandara internasional yang melayani kota Caracas sendiri rusak parah.
sentences.structure: Kalimat utama (The Colombians were also able to fly into Caracas with two Hercules C-130) + klausa relatif non-restriktif (which, of course, took time) + klausa keterangan sebab (because the runway itself at the international airport, which serves the city of Caracas, was badly damaged), yang di dalamnya terdapat klausa relatif non-restriktif lain (which serves the city of Caracas).
sentences.analysis: Klausa relatif bersarang: 'which' pertama merujuk pada seluruh kalimat utama, 'which' kedua menerangkan 'the international airport'; 'of course' sebagai sisipan; 'Hercules C-130' adalah model pesawat angkut militer.

sentences.en: You can see from that video that you just played that the quake hit with the plane on the tarmac and created open cracks, really, on the tarmac of the runway.
sentences.cn: Anda dapat melihat dari video yang baru saja Anda putar bahwa gempa terjadi saat pesawat berada di apron dan menciptakan retakan terbuka, sungguh, di apron landasan pacu.
sentences.structure: Kalimat utama (You can see from that video) + klausa relatif (that you just played) + klausa objek (that the quake hit with the plane on the tarmac and created open cracks, really, on the tarmac of the runway).
sentences.analysis: Struktur 'see from...that'; 'with the plane on the tarmac' adalah konstruksi nominatif absolut yang menyatakan keadaan menyertai; 'really' sebagai sisipan untuk penekanan; 'open cracks' berarti retakan yang jelas terlihat.

sentences.en: So, these military planes that carry the aid had to make some adjustments in order to arrive as quickly and as close as possible to the relief zone, which is the state of La Guaira, where the airport is located, which is this coastal state close to Caracas, but on the coast on the Caribbean coast, where the majority of the damage is -- and being confined.
sentences.cn: Oleh karena itu, pesawat militer yang membawa bantuan harus melakukan beberapa penyesuaian agar tiba secepat dan sedekat mungkin ke zona bantuan, yaitu negara bagian La Guaira, tempat bandara berada, yang merupakan negara bagian pesisir dekat Caracas, tetapi di pesisir Laut Karibia, tempat sebagian besar kerusakan terkonsentrasi.
sentences.structure: Kalimat utama (these military planes had to make some adjustments) + klausa relatif (that carry the aid) + keterangan tujuan (in order to arrive as quickly and as close as possible to the relief zone) + klausa relatif non-restriktif (which is the state of La Guaira) + klausa relatif non-restriktif (where the airport is located) + aposisi (which is this coastal state close to Caracas, but on the coast on the Caribbean coast) + klausa relatif (where the majority of the damage is -- and being confined).
sentences.analysis: Beberapa klausa relatif saling menerangkan; 'as quickly and as close as possible' adalah struktur perbandingan berurutan; 'relief zone' berarti zona bantuan; 'confined' berarti terkonsentrasi atau terbatas.

sentences.en: By the way, it's still surreal to me that we are seeing a major marine general in the grounds of Caracas less than six months after the ousting of Maduro.
sentences.cn: Omong-omong, melihat seorang mayor jenderal marinir di halaman Caracas kurang dari enam bulan setelah penggulingan Maduro masih terasa tidak nyata bagi saya.
sentences.structure: Kalimat utama (it's still surreal to me) + klausa subjek (that we are seeing a major marine general in the grounds of Caracas less than six months after the ousting of Maduro).
sentences.analysis: 'it' sebagai subjek formal, subjek sesungguhnya adalah klausa 'that'; 'surreal' berarti tidak nyata; 'ousting' berarti penggulingan; 'major marine general' adalah mayor jenderal marinir.

sentences.en: I think heavy machinery is the trickiest thing, because one thing is to bring in containers with medicines, with plasters, with emergency kit, with generators.
sentences.cn: Saya pikir alat berat adalah hal yang paling rumit, karena satu hal adalah membawa kontainer berisi obat-obatan, plester, perlengkapan darurat, generator.
sentences.structure: Kalimat utama (I think heavy machinery is the trickiest thing) + klausa keterangan sebab (because one thing is to bring in containers with medicines, with plasters, with emergency kit, with generators).
sentences.analysis: 'trickiest' berarti paling rumit; 'one thing is to...' menyiratkan perbandingan, selanjutnya akan ada 'another thing is...'; beberapa 'with' untuk mendaftar barang.

sentences.en: But what do they need in La Guaira is excavator; big machinery in order to lift in a safely way, the -- all of these floors that have been pancaked on top of each other because of the -- of the power of the tremors.
sentences.cn: Tetapi yang mereka butuhkan di La Guaira adalah ekskavator; alat berat, untuk mengangkat dengan aman semua lantai yang telah menimpa satu sama lain karena kekuatan gempa.
sentences.structure: Klausa subjek (what do they need in La Guaira) + predikat (is excavator) + aposisi (big machinery) + keterangan tujuan (in order to lift in a safely way) + objek (the -- all of these floors) + klausa relatif (that have been pancaked on top of each other) + keterangan sebab (because of the -- of the power of the tremors).
sentences.analysis: 'what' memulai klausa subjek; 'pancaked' adalah istilah umum di berita yang menggambarkan bangunan runtuh seperti panekuk; 'in a safely way' seharusnya 'in a safe way', mungkin kesalahan bicara; tanda pisah menunjukkan keraguan atau koreksi.

sentences.en: Our team is at the city, and they have been filming it.
sentences.cn: Tim kami berada di kota itu, dan mereka telah merekamnya.
sentences.structure: Kalimat majemuk: subjek (Our team) + predikat (is at the city) + konjungsi (and) + subjek (they) + present perfect continuous (have been filming it).
sentences.analysis: Kalimat majemuk sederhana, tetapi 'have been filming' menekankan tindakan yang berlangsung terus.

sentences.en: But in La Guaira yesterday, when they were down in the area most affected, they were really talking about the lack of equipment, the lack of gear.
sentences.cn: Tetapi kemarin di La Guaira, ketika mereka berada di daerah yang paling parah terkena dampak, mereka benar-benar membicarakan tentang kurangnya peralatan dan perlengkapan.
sentences.structure: Keterangan waktu (yesterday) + keterangan tempat (in La Guaira) + klausa keterangan waktu (when they were down in the area most affected) + kalimat utama (they were really talking about the lack of equipment, the lack of gear).
sentences.analysis: 'down in' berarti masuk ke suatu daerah; 'most affected' adalah frase partisip lampau sebagai penerang 'area'; 'lack of equipment, the lack of gear' sejajar untuk menekankan kekurangan.

sentences.en: Now, while the people in Venezuela are desperate for help, we here in the U.S. have seen two rulings from the Supreme Court indicating that the U.S. is not quite the place of refuge it might have been.
sentences.cn: Sekarang, ketika rakyat Venezuela sangat membutuhkan bantuan, kita di sini di AS melihat dua keputusan Mahkamah Agung yang menunjukkan bahwa AS bukan lagi tempat perlindungan seperti dulu.
sentences.structure: Klausa waktu (while the people in Venezuela are desperate for help) + klausa utama (we here in the U.S. have seen two rulings from the Supreme Court) + frase partisip kini (indicating that the U.S. is not quite the place of refuge it might have been), yang berisi klausa objek (that the U.S. is not quite the place of refuge) + klausa relatif (it might have been).
sentences.analysis: 'while' menunjukkan kontras; 'desperate for' berarti sangat membutuhkan; 'indicating' memimpin akibat yang menyertai; 'not quite the place of refuge it might have been' menggunakan subjungtif, menunjukkan kebalikan dari fakta masa lalu.

sentences.en: The Supreme Court ruled immigration officials at the U.S.-Mexico border can turn away asylum seekers before they enter the country.
sentences.cn: Mahkamah Agung memutuskan bahwa petugas imigrasi di perbatasan AS-Meksiko dapat menolak pencari suaka sebelum mereka memasuki negara itu.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (The Supreme Court ruled) + klausa objek (immigration officials at the U.S.-Mexico border can turn away asylum seekers before they enter the country), yang berisi klausa waktu (before they enter the country).
sentences.analysis: 'ruled' diikuti 'that' yang dihilangkan; 'turn away' berarti menolak, mengusir; 'asylum seekers' merujuk pada pencari suaka.

sentences.en: Now, in her dissent, Justice Sonia Sotomayor wrote, "The consequences of today's decision are predictable. More people will die."
sentences.cn: Dalam pendapat berbeda, Hakim Sonia Sotomayor menulis: "Konsekuensi dari keputusan hari ini dapat diprediksi. Lebih banyak orang akan mati."
sentences.structure: Keterangan (in her dissent) + klausa utama (Justice Sonia Sotomayor wrote) + kutipan langsung ("The consequences of today's decision are predictable. More people will die.").
sentences.analysis: 'dissent' merujuk pada pendapat berbeda di Mahkamah Agung; kutipan langsung meningkatkan otoritas dan dampak emosional.

sentences.en: The justices also allowed the Trump administration to strip temporary protected status for hundreds of thousands of Haitians and Syrians living in the U.S.
sentences.cn: Para hakim juga mengizinkan pemerintahan Trump untuk mencabut status perlindungan sementara bagi ratusan ribu orang Haiti dan Suriah yang tinggal di AS.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (The justices also allowed the Trump administration to strip temporary protected status) + frase preposisi (for hundreds of thousands of Haitians and Syrians) + frase partisip kini (living in the U.S.).
sentences.analysis: Struktur 'allow...to strip'; 'strip' berarti mencabut; 'temporary protected status' adalah istilah hukum, disingkat TPS; 'hundreds of thousands of' berarti ratusan ribu.

sentences.en: The whole statute exists temporarily to give people protection while the country's in turmoil or after they suffer a hurricane.
sentences.cn: Seluruh undang-undang itu ada sementara untuk memberikan perlindungan kepada orang-orang ketika negara dalam kekacauan atau setelah mereka mengalami badai.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (The whole statute exists temporarily) + keterangan tujuan (to give people protection) + klausa waktu (while the country's in turmoil or after they suffer a hurricane).
sentences.analysis: 'statute' merujuk pada undang-undang; 'in turmoil' berarti dalam kekacauan; 'while' dan 'after' memimpin klausa waktu, menunjukkan situasi berbeda.

sentences.en: But the problem is, no administration has had the guts to actually follow that statute.
sentences.cn: Tapi masalahnya, tidak ada pemerintahan yang memiliki keberanian untuk benar-benar mematuhi undang-undang itu.
sentences.structure: Klausa utama (But the problem is) + klausa predikat (no administration has had the guts to actually follow that statute).
sentences.analysis: 'have the guts to do' adalah ungkapan lisan, berarti memiliki keberanian untuk melakukan sesuatu; 'follow that statute' berarti mematuhi undang-undang.

sentences.en: This same government that tells me that it is too dangerous to set foot in Haiti, just told 350,000 Haitians that they have to go back there anyway, even to their death sentence.
sentences.cn: Pemerintah yang sama yang mengatakan kepada saya bahwa terlalu berbahaya untuk menginjakkan kaki di Haiti, baru saja mengatakan kepada 350.000 orang Haiti bahwa mereka harus kembali ke sana, bahkan menghadapi hukuman mati.
sentences.structure: Subjek (This same government) + klausa relatif (that tells me that it is too dangerous to set foot in Haiti) + predikat (just told) + objek tidak langsung (350,000 Haitians) + klausa objek (that they have to go back there anyway, even to their death sentence).
sentences.analysis: Klausa relatif memodifikasi 'government', berisi struktur 'tell sb that'; 'set foot in' berarti memasuki; 'death sentence' adalah metafora ancaman kematian, menekankan bahaya.

sentences.en: You cannot have it both ways.
sentences.cn: Kamu tidak bisa mendapatkan keduanya.
sentences.structure: Kalimat sederhana: Subjek (You) + predikat (cannot have) + objek (it) + keterangan (both ways).
sentences.analysis: Idiom, berarti tidak bisa memiliki dua hal yang bertentangan secara bersamaan, sering digunakan untuk mengkritik posisi yang kontradiktif.

topics.title: Venezuela Earthquake and International Rescue
topics.content: On June 25, 2026, a strong earthquake struck the northern coastal region of Venezuela, severely affecting the capital Caracas and La Guaira state. The death toll has risen to 235, with over 4,300 injured. International relief supplies have begun to arrive, but there is a shortage of heavy excavation equipment. Rescue teams from the Dominican Republic, Colombia, and the United States have been dispatched. The 72 hours after the earthquake are considered the "golden window" for rescue.
topics.keywords: earthquake · death toll · golden window · excavator · relief zone

topics.title: US Supreme Court Immigration Rulings
topics.content: On June 26, 2026, the US Supreme Court made two important immigration rulings: one allowing border officials to turn away asylum seekers before they enter the United States, and the other supporting the Trump administration's termination of Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for immigrants from Haiti, Syria, and other countries. TPS is a temporary immigration status granted to foreigners who cannot return to their home countries due to war or disaster.
topics.keywords: asylum seeker · temporary protected status · dissent · strip · statute

topics.title: Vice President Vance's Watergate Comments
topics.content: US Vice President J.D. Vance compared himself to former President Richard Nixon in recent remarks and claimed that Watergate was a conspiracy of the "deep state." Watergate was a political scandal in 1972 that led to Nixon's resignation. Vance's comments sparked controversy and were criticized as an attempt to downplay historical events.
topics.keywords: deep-state conspiracy · Watergate · Richard Nixon · Vice President

topics.title: US Team Loses World Cup Opener
topics.content: In the group stage of the 2026 World Cup, the US team unexpectedly lost to Turkey but still advanced to the round of 32 based on previous results. The team needs to shake off the loss and bounce back in the knockout rounds. The World Cup is the most-watched football event globally, and the US team has improved in recent years but still lacks consistency.
topics.keywords: World Cup · stunned · shake off · bounce back · Team USA

quiz.question: In the original text, 'first responders sift through the rubble', what does 'sift through' most closely mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Sift through' in a news context often means 'to search carefully, to examine thoroughly', especially when looking for survivors in rubble. Option A is the literal meaning, but here it is used figuratively.

quiz.question: In the original text 'the Trump administration to strip temporary protected status', what does 'strip' mean?
quiz.explanation: 'Strip' in a legal/political context often means 'to deprive (of rights, status, etc.)'. Here it means to cancel temporary protected status.

quiz.question: 原文 'no administration has had the guts to actually follow that statute' 中 'have the guts to' 的意思是：
quiz.explanation: have the guts to 是固定搭配，意为'有勇气做某事'。guts 在此指'勇气'，而非'内脏'。

quiz.question: 根据原文，最高法院在移民问题上作出了哪两项裁决？
options: A. 允许边境官员拒绝庇护申请；允许终止TPS
B. 扩大庇护申请范围；延长TPS
C. 禁止边境官员拒绝庇护申请；要求保留TPS
D. 允许庇护申请者带家属；取消TPS
quiz.explanation: 原文明确提到：最高法院裁定边境官员可以拒绝庇护申请人，并允许政府终止海地、叙利亚等国的TPS。

quiz.question: 委内瑞拉地震救援中，目前最急需的物资是什么？
quiz.explanation: 原文中Stefano Pozzebon指出，拉瓜伊拉最需要的是挖掘机等大型机械，因为建筑坍塌叠压，需要重型设备清理。

quiz.question: 副总统万斯将水门事件描述为什么？
options: B. 一个深层政府阴谋
quiz.explanation: 原文说：Vance says Watergate was a deep-state conspiracy，即万斯称水门事件是深层政府阴谋。
